raw_consumer_statement: The beginning of 2025 around XXXX ( I am A co owner to my fathers account ) we owed citi card somewhere around {$16000.00} to which I wrote a check for {$17000.00}. They contacted us and said we overpaid by {$3900.00} and they even wrote us a check for that amount and then they closed our account. This was back in XXXX. So we owed money we overpaid they wrote us a check for the difference and now XXXX  Months later theyre claiming we owe them {$11000.00} somehow even when it says in XXXX we owed nothing because the account was closed then in XXXX all of a sudden its {$9000.00} that they magically added {$2000.00} too. Its laughable. I will contact my old bank ( I dont bank with XXXX anymore ) and I will upload photos of the payment being made. I demand this be removed from both mine and my fathers credit report as we have already resolved this!
